title: The Crew Reacts to a Former Enemy
description: On pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part focuses on the sky island rumor begins. The crew hears clues that point beyond normal seas, setting up the mystery of an island in the sky and the search for proof.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Sky Island Rumor Begins sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Nico Robin, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey! The princess' speech is starting!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Thank god she's fine and well!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The coming of age's ceremony's started!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Gently washing away my trifling concerns.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: At other times, they were fierce,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Laughing to tear apart my timid feelings.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Crossed over monstrous waves as if dancing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And then it points a finger out.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But to me, it is the truth.

summary: The crew hears clues that point beyond normal seas, setting up the mystery of an island in the sky and the search for proof.
